reason: production-api-client-switch PAC-R0 intake: net-new backend auth/RLS requirement, queued for PO sign-off before PAC-R3 wires Supabase Auth

node.statement: The application authenticates and authorizes users via Supabase Auth (email + OAuth) with workspace-scoped Row Level Security (25 policies covering all 22 contract routes), replacing the mock MyAccess/DCXAccess stand-ins.
